text: I'm going to kill myself. I've planned it all out. I'm getting the pills from the kitchen tonight.
rationale: Active intent with plan and specific means/timeframe (pills, tonight). Deterministic crisis.

text: I can't do this anymore. I'm done. Going to end it now.
rationale: Immediate intent stated with present-tense language ('going to', 'now'). Attempt likely imminent.

text: k i l l  m y s e l f
rationale: Spaced-out censoring of direct suicidal intent. Obfuscation does not reduce urgency.

text: Just took a full bottle of paracetamol. I want to die.
rationale: Overdose in progress with suicidal intent stated. Immediate medical and psychiatric emergency.

text: I've cut my wrists open and I'm not going to stop.
rationale: Self-harm with medical danger ongoing. Active intent to continue.

text: I'm going to jump off the bridge tonight. I have the date and time planned.
rationale: Specific plan with timeframe and location. Deterministic tier-1 risk.

text: su1cide is the only way out
rationale: Misspelled suicidal statement presenting suicide as definitive solution. Obfuscation via l33t speak.

text: I'm in the middle of my suicide attempt right now. Please don't call anyone.
rationale: Attempt currently in progress. Immediate risk, possible means-seeking through denial of help.

text: kms
rationale: Evasion slang abbreviation for 'kill myself'. Context-free; treated as direct intent given isolation.

text: I've tied a noose. I'm standing on the chair. This is it.
rationale: Means (noose) prepared and positioned for immediate execution. Attempt imminent or in progress.

text: unalive myself tonight
rationale: Evasion euphemism 'unalive' with specific timeframe. Obfuscated intent to die.

text: caught the bus
rationale: Evasion slang for suicide attempt or completion. Obfuscated reference to a lethal act.

text: How many sleeping pills would kill me?
rationale: Direct means-seeking with lethal intent. Asking for specific dosage to achieve death.

text: I'm going to slit my wrists properly this time. Not just scratches.
rationale: History of self-harm escalating to lethal intent. 'Properly this time' indicates increased lethality.

text: sewerslide is the answer
rationale: Evasion slang euphemism for suicide. Obfuscated ideation framed as solution.

text: I have a gun and I'm not afraid to use it on myself
rationale: Lethal means explicitly identified with intent and resolve stated. Immediate danger.

text: Going to sleep and not waking up. I've got the pills ready.
rationale: Euphemism paired with concrete means (pills ready). Suicidal intent clear despite indirect language.

text: k*ll myself
rationale: Censoring via asterisk ('k*ll') of direct suicidal statement. Obfuscated intent.

text: I'm going to overdose on my antidepressants. I want to die now.
rationale: Specific method (antidepressants), means available, suicidal intent explicit. Overdose with stated reason.

text: Can't take this anymore. I'm swallowing all my pills right now.
rationale: Means-seeking in progress (pills being consumed). Present tense indicates immediate action.

text: I've written a note. I'm doing this tonight.
rationale: Plan includes suicide note; timeframe specific. Demonstrates serious intent and preparation.

text: I deserve to die and I have the courage to do it
rationale: Intent stated with resolve ('have the courage'). Reframing suicide as justified and achievable.

text: wish i cud just unalive rn
rationale: Evasion ('unalive') with present intent ('rn'). Casual register does not reduce urgency.

text: I'm going to hang myself
rationale: Lethal method specified with intent. Direct suicidal statement.

text: drowned myself in pills last nite cant wake up
rationale: Overdose completion or near-completion reported ('last nite'). Immediate medical emergency.

text: I'm at the train station. This is where it ends.
rationale: Location-specific with intent ('where it ends'). Suggests imminent means-seeking via transport.

text: s u i c i d e is the only option left
rationale: Spaced-out censoring of suicide. Stated as definitive solution.

text: I've been planning this for weeks. Tonight I'm finally going through with it.
rationale: Premeditation disclosed, plan described as actionable. Timeframe imminent.

text: took too many sleeping pills on purpose. i want to sleep forever.
rationale: Overdose taken intentionally with euphemism ('sleep forever'). Suicidal intent clear.

text: how do i inject heroin lethally
rationale: Means-seeking: asking for lethal dosage method. Implicit suicidal intent.

text: I'm done pretending everything's okay. I'm not waking up tomorrow.
rationale: Intent to end life before tomorrow stated. Suicide plan for imminent timeframe.

text: My family would be better off if I was dead
rationale: Hopelessness ideation without stated plan or intent. Passive self-harm ideation.

text: I keep thinking about ways to hurt myself. It won't stop.
rationale: Intrusive self-harm urges described without plan or intent to act. Current passive ideation.

text: I've thought about suicide most days this week
rationale: Passive suicidal ideation over time. No plan, attempt, or immediate intent.

text: I don't want to be alive anymore but I'm not going to do anything about it
rationale: Explicit passive ideation with denial of intent to act. Elevated but not immediate.

text: I cut myself after my relapse. The physical pain was easier to handle.
rationale: Historical self-harm disclosure tied to coping. No current ideation or plan stated.

text: When I quit smoking last month I hurt myself to cope. It helped for a bit.
rationale: Past self-harm during withdrawal, framed as resolved coping mechanism. Historical context.

text: I have scars all over my arms from when things were really bad
rationale: Evidence of past self-harm ('scars'). No current ideation but risk history noted.

text: Sometimes I feel like I should just give up and let it happen
rationale: Passive ideation ('let it happen'). Helplessness without active intent.

text: I attempted suicide 3 years ago. I don't feel like I'm at that point now but it's scary sometimes
rationale: History of attempt disclosed; current ideation denied but vulnerability acknowledged.

text: Can't stop thinking about it. The urges are getting stronger.
rationale: Escalating passive urges without plan. Ideation trajectory concerning.

text: unalive thoughts wont leave me alone
rationale: Obfuscated euphemism ('unalive') for suicidal thoughts. Evasion slang; passive ideation.

text: been having those thoughts again, the dark ones. not going to do anything but they're back
rationale: Recurrence of suicidal ideation with explicit denial of intent; passive ideation warrants human review.

text: found my old blades when i was clearing out the bathroom. didnt use them. put them back though
rationale: Historical self-harm with retained means and current urges implied by keeping them; no immediate act.

text: quitting drinking has me feeling like whats even the point of me
rationale: Worthlessness and hopelessness cluster during behaviour change; no plan or intent stated.

text: sometimes at 3am i think my family would cope better without me around tbh
rationale: Perceived-burdensomeness ideation, a recognised risk marker; passive, no plan or timeframe.

text: i used to hurt myself when stress got bad. the urge came back this week with the cravings
rationale: Self-harm history with current returning urges but no immediate intent; elevated risk.

text: not gonna lie the s h thoughts are creeping back since i stopped vaping
rationale: Obfuscated abbreviation 's h' for self-harm; returning thoughts without stated intent.

text: keep daydreaming about just not existing anymore. no plans, just tired
rationale: Passive death wish explicitly without plan; ideation requires elevated handling, not crisis flow.

text: my mate asked if i was ok and i said yeah but honestly some days i dont want to be here
rationale: Concealed passive ideation disclosed to the app; no plan, intent, or timeframe stated.

text: The insomnia makes me feel like there's no point to living
rationale: Hopelessness ideation triggered by sleep deprivation. Passive without intent.

text: k*ll myself thoughts keep coming back
rationale: Censored suicidal thought ('k*ll') with escalating pattern. Obfuscation via asterisk; passive ideation.

text: s u i c i d e crossed my mind yesterday but I told my friend instead
rationale: Spaced-out censoring of ideation with protective action taken. Passive idea; help-seeking response.

text: I keep fantasizing about what life would be like if I wasn't here

text: I'd kill for a cigarette right now
rationale: Standard hyperbolic idiom expressing intense craving. No literal self-harm or suicidal meaning.
